message:
refactor(crush): migrate Crush connector from rusqlite to frankensqlite

Replace the rusqlite dependency with frankensqlite for the Crush
connector, complying with AGENTS.md Rule 2 (no new rusqlite code).

Cargo.toml:
- Add frankensqlite path dependency (fsqlite crate)
- Change "crush" feature from dep:rusqlite to dep:frankensqlite

src/connectors/crush.rs:
- Replace `rusqlite::Connection` with frankensqlite compat layer:
  `open_with_flags`, `ConnectionExt`, `RowExt`, `OpenFlags`, `ParamValue`
- Replace `row.get(N)` calls with `row.get_typed(N)` (frankensqlite API)
- Replace `stmt.query_map()` with `conn.query_map_collect()` which
  returns a collected Vec directly
- Update `group_rows_into_conversations()` call to pass slice reference
  instead of iterator (matches new return type)
- Set busy_timeout via `conn.execute("PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000")`
  instead of the rusqlite-specific `conn.busy_timeout()` method

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,9 @@ base64 = { version = "0.22", optional = true }
 # --- Optional: Cursor/OpenCode SQLite session databases ---
 rusqlite = { version = "0.38", optional = true, features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }
 
+# --- Optional: frankensqlite for new connectors (Crush, etc.) ---
+frankensqlite = { path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite", package = "fsqlite", optional = true }
+
 [features]
 default = []
 # Base connector support: shared deps for all 15 connectors
@@ -53,8 +56,8 @@ chatgpt = ["connectors", "dep:aes-gcm", "dep:base64"]
 cursor = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # OpenCode: SQLite database access for v1.2+ opencode.db
 opencode = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite"]
-# Crush: SQLite database access for Charm's Crush agent
-crush = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite"]
+# Crush: SQLite database access for Charm's Crush agent (uses frankensqlite)
+crush = ["connectors", "dep:frankensqlite"]
 # All connectors enabled
 all-connectors = ["connectors", "chatgpt", "cursor", "opencode", "crush"]
